chapter_title.en: Chapter on Oaths, Vows, and Expiations

text: 4300 - وَ قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ اَلْبَاقِرُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "مَا تَرَكَ عَبْدٌ شَيْئاً لِلَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فَفَقَدَهُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4300 - Abu Ja'far Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) said:
"No servant leaves something for the sake of Allah (swt), the Almighty and Glorious, and then finds himself in loss because of it."
